description: A university rocketry club needs to retrofit their 'simple_model_rocket.ork' to carry an 80-gram CanSat payload. Modify the rocket's airframe to include a 66mm diameter payload bay (minimum 100mm length) using a transition from the original 24.8mm body. The new configuration must include a 66mm nose cone and an 80g mass component named 'CanSat' within the payload bay. Upgrade the propulsion from the original A8-3 motor to a more powerful motor (C, D, E, or F class) capable of reaching an apogee of at least 50 meters. Save the modified design to ~/Documents/rockets/cansat_retrofit.ork and export an integration report to ~/Documents/exports/cansat_report.txt documenting the payload diameter (66mm), mass (80g), selected motor, and simulated apogee.
